    Creates a Brigadier-backed command registry.

    Creates a Brigadier-backed command registry with optional Brigadier argument resolvers.
    BrigadierCommandRegistry.AudienceFactory<S> - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier
    Factory for wrapping a command source into an audience.
    BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentRegistry<S> - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier
    Registry for Brigadier argument resolvers.
    BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentResolver<S> - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier
    Resolves Brigadier argument shape for a command argument.
    BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentShape - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier
    Brigadier-side shape for a single command argument.

    P

    priority() - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentResolver
    Higher priority resolvers run first.

    R

    register(BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentResolver) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentRegistry
    Registers a custom argument resolver.

    Registers all provided commands.
    registerAllSpecs(CommandDispatcher, CommandSpec...) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
    Registers all provided command specs.
    registerCommand(CommandDispatcher, MagicCommand) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
    Registers a single MagicUtils command.
    registerSpec(CommandDispatcher, CommandSpec) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
    Registers a compatibility command spec by converting it to a MagicCommand.
    resolve(CommandArgument) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentResolver
    Returns a Brigadier shape for the argument or null when unsupported.
    resolve(CommandArgument) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentRegistry
    Resolves a Brigadier shape for a command argument.
    runOnMain(S, Runnable) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
    Runs a task on the main thread when an executor is provided.

    U
